name: Beach Energy Limited
description: Beach Energy Limited is an Australia-based oil and gas exploration and production company. Headquartered in Adelaide, South Australia, the company has a diverse portfolio of active onshore and offshore oil and gas assets across Australia and New Zealand. Beach Energy is one of Australia's largest onshore oil producers and a key supplier of gas to the domestic market, operating facilities in the Cooper Basin, Otway Basin, Bass Basin, Perth Basin, and Taranaki Basin.
